hero.headline: Your Remote Property. Fully Connected. Fully Defended.
hero.subheadline: Elite integration of satellite internet, enterprise mesh networking, smart IP surveillance, home automation, and renewable energy systems — for premium fincas across southeast Spain, from Valencia and Alicante to Murcia and the Costa Blanca.
hero.trustLine: Based in Almansa — local experts serving property owners across southeast Spain

trustBadges.heading: Technologies We Typically Work With
trustBadges.note: Equipment selection is finalised during your site assessment — we choose the best solution for each specific project and location.

servicesSection.heading: Complete Estate Intelligence
servicesSection.subheading: Every system engineered for remote reliability, rural conditions, and zero-compromise performance.

connectivity.title: Flawless Connectivity
connectivity.shortDesc: Starlink structural mounting, 4G/5G multi-WAN redundancy, and property-wide Ubiquiti mesh — including P2P bridges to remote gates and guest houses.
connectivity.hero: Your finca deserves enterprise-grade connectivity, not compromises.

starlink.title: Starlink Structural Mounting
starlink.body: We engineer robust, ground-penetrating or roof-anchored mounts for Starlink dishes — optimised for Spanish wind loads, angle of elevation for southern latitudes, and clean cable routing. No wobbling arms, no signal interruptions during Levante winds.

wan.title: 4G/5G Multi-WAN Redundancy
wan.body: We configure dual-WAN routers with automatic failover: Starlink as primary, 4G/5G LTE as seamless backup. If one link drops, your cameras, automation, and remote access stay live. Zero manual intervention required.

ubiquiti.title: Ubiquiti UniFi Estate Networking
ubiquiti.body: Full UniFi Dream Machine or Cloud Gateway deployments. We place access points for outdoor coverage of pools, garages, and terraces. Point-to-point wireless bridges connect remote gates, guest casas, or machinery sheds — up to 500m without trenching cable.

items.q: Can you work with my existing router or network equipment?
items.a: Yes. We assess your existing setup during the site survey and either integrate with it or recommend a replacement if performance falls short of what the property requires.

items.q: How long does a full installation take?
items.a: Most installations complete within 1–2 days depending on property size and number of access points or wireless bridges required.

items.q: Will satellite internet work at my finca location?
items.a: We survey your site for an unobstructed sky view toward the south. Rural fincas typically make ideal candidates — we confirm viability before any commitment.

items.q: What happens if the primary connection goes down?
items.a: Automatic failover activates the backup mobile data link within seconds. No manual action required — your cameras, remote access, and automations stay live.

security.title: Autonomous Security
security.shortDesc: Smart IP surveillance grids, local NVR deployment, edge-AI object and vehicle detection, and encrypted remote cloud streaming access.
security.hero: Know exactly what is on your property — from anywhere in the world.

cameras.title: Smart IP Surveillance Grid
cameras.body: We design and mount Reolink IP camera networks covering all entry points, perimeters, and blind spots. PoE-powered from your UniFi switch — clean, weatherproof installations with zero visible cabling.

nvr.title: Local NVR Deployment
nvr.body: All footage stored locally on a hardened NVR appliance — no mandatory cloud subscription, no data leaving your property without your consent. RAID-configured for redundancy. We size storage for your camera count and retention policy.

detection.title: Edge-AI Object & Vehicle Detection
detection.body: We calibrate smart detection zones per camera: person, vehicle, and animal classification. False alerts from tree movement or insects are eliminated. Push notifications to your phone when a vehicle enters the driveway — not every time a cat walks past.

items.q: Does my camera system need an internet connection to work?
items.a: No. All footage is recorded locally on a dedicated recorder at the property. Remote viewing over the internet is optional and always uses encrypted connections.

items.q: How many cameras do I need?
items.a: We determine the right number during the free site survey, based on your property's entry points, perimeter length, and any specific blind spots you want covered.

items.q: Can I access live footage from abroad?
items.a: Yes — securely, via an encrypted tunnel. Your footage never passes through third-party servers without your explicit consent.

items.q: Do cameras stay on during a power cut?
items.a: We can integrate battery backup (UPS) so critical cameras and the recording unit remain live during short outages. Solar-paired systems can extend this considerably.

automation.title: Smart Finca Automation
automation.shortDesc: Centralised Home Assistant configurations for automated driveway gates, local weather stations, and wind/rain-responsive shades or bioclimatic pergolas.
automation.hero: Your finca responds intelligently to conditions — with or without you present.

gates.title: Automated Gate Control
gates.body: We integrate existing or new gate motors into Home Assistant via MQTT or local API. Open your gate from anywhere via your phone, set schedules, or trigger on vehicle detection. Full audit log of every open/close event.

weather.title: Local Weather Station Integration
weather.body: We mount professional-grade local weather stations and feed live wind speed, rain accumulation, UV index, and temperature into Home Assistant dashboards. Your automations respond to real local conditions, not distant met office data.

shades.title: Wind & Rain Responsive Shades
shades.body: Bioclimatic pergola louvres, exterior roller blinds, and awnings are wired to Home Assistant. They retract automatically when wind exceeds safe thresholds or rain begins — protecting your investment without you lifting a finger.

items.q: Do I need to be technically minded to use the system?
items.a: No. We build simple, intuitive dashboards and apps tailored to how you live. You see exactly what matters — nothing more.

items.q: Can you automate my existing gate?
items.a: In most cases yes. We assess your existing gate motor during the site survey and integrate it. If the motor is too old or incompatible, we source a suitable replacement.

items.q: Do automations keep working without internet?
items.a: Yes. The automation hub runs entirely locally on your property. Gates, shades, lighting, and all programmed routines continue without any internet connection.

items.q: What existing smart home devices can you integrate?
items.a: The platform we typically work with supports thousands of integrations across most major brands. We assess compatibility with your existing devices during the site survey.

energy.title: Smart Energy & Utilities
energy.shortDesc: Solar structural optimisation, Lithium/Victron upgrades, remote energy monitoring, smart landscape lighting, and automated moisture-sensing water shut-off.
energy.hero: Energy independence — engineered, monitored, and future-proofed.

solar.title: Solar Structural Optimisation
solar.body: We survey your existing panel layouts and mounting structures for angle, shading losses, and structural integrity. We redesign and re-mount for maximum yield across the Spanish solar calendar. Panel wiring and DC-side connections handled by our certified electrical partners.

victron.title: Lithium & Victron Upgrades
victron.body: We upgrade ageing lead-acid battery banks to modern LiFePO4 configurations with Victron MultiPlus or Quattro inverter-chargers. Remote monitoring via VRM Portal gives you live state-of-charge, historical trends, and proactive degradation alerts.

utilities.title: Smart Lighting & Water Shut-Off
utilities.body: Landscape and architectural lighting on smart schedules or presence triggers. Wireless moisture sensors at key supply points integrated with inline motorised shut-off valves — automatic water isolation when a pipe leak is detected, minimising damage while you are away.

items.q: Can you expand my existing solar system?
items.a: Yes. We survey your structural capacity and electrical compatibility, then coordinate any grid-side expansion with our certified electrical partners at transparent rates.

items.q: What is the typical payback period on a battery upgrade?
items.a: Highly variable, but many clients see payback within 4–6 years through reduced grid dependency and avoided costly battery replacement down the line.

items.q: Can you monitor my energy system remotely?
items.a: Yes. We configure remote monitoring portals giving you — and us — 24/7 visibility of your system's output, state of charge, and any alerts.

items.q: Do you need planning permission for solar in Spain?
items.a: For residential self-consumption installations below 10kWp, a simplified notification applies rather than full planning. We guide you through local requirements for your specific municipality.

fincaCare.heading: Finca Care Subscriptions
fincaCare.subheading: Three tiers of always-on estate protection. From digital backbone management to full hands-off luxury coverage — your property, permanently looked after.

digital.name: Digital Core
features: Weekly automated backups — network config, smart scripts & NVR
Remote firmware & security patching, scheduled overnight
Real-time alerts — internet uptime, server health, battery degradation & leak sensors
Monthly digital health report delivered to your inbox

essential.name: Finca Essential
essential.tagline: Peace of mind for properties that sit empty.
features: Quarterly on-site audit — 4 full property walkthroughs per year
Basic hardware maintenance: camera lens clean, sensor & rack inspection

elite.name: Absolute Elite
elite.tagline: Complete hands-off luxury property tech coverage.
features: Everything in Digital Core & Finca Essential
Monthly on-site audit — 12 full visits per year
Deep hardware tune-up: server clean, solar panel calima wipe, battery diagnostics
Guaranteed next-day emergency dispatch for critical failures
Premium post-visit digital report with photos after every audit

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes. All three plans are rolling monthly subscriptions with no minimum term. Cancel with 30 days' notice.

items.q: What area do you cover for on-site visits?
items.a: We're based in Almansa and serve southeast Spain — Valencia, Alicante, Murcia, the Costa Blanca, and everything within roughly an hour's drive.

items.q: Is electrical work included?
items.a: We engineer, mount, and configure all technical infrastructure. High-voltage certified grid connections are coordinated via our licensed local electrician partners at transparent rates.

items.q: Do I need to be present during visits?
items.a: No. With key-safe or gate code access we complete all audits without you travelling to the property.

items.q: What happens if something breaks between scheduled visits?
items.a: Digital Core clients can request a reactive visit at standard day-rate. Finca Essential clients receive priority 48-hour emergency dispatch. Absolute Elite clients have guaranteed next-day dispatch built into the plan — no extra charge for critical failures.

items.q: Can I pause my plan when I'm at the property?
items.a: Yes. Request a pause with 30 days' notice and your subscription resumes at the same rate when you need coverage again.

items.q: Do you send a report after each on-site visit?
items.a: Finca Essential clients receive a digital report after each quarterly audit. Absolute Elite clients receive a premium post-visit report with photographs delivered after every monthly visit.

items.q: What does the monthly health report include?
items.a: Connectivity uptime, device health scores, battery state-of-charge trends, current firmware versions, and a summary of any alerts triggered during the month.

items.q: Is there a one-time setup fee?
items.a: A one-time onboarding assessment covers the initial site audit, system documentation, and plan configuration. The fee is quoted transparently at your first consultation.

promotion.headline: 20% off all plans — until 30 November 2026
promotion.body: To mark our public launch across southeast Spain, every Finca Care plan launches at 20% below standard rate. Clients who join before 1 December 2026 lock in this reduced rate for the lifetime of their subscription.

billing.annualNote: Billed as a single annual payment · 12-month minimum commitment

compliance.notice: NextGen Finca engineers, mounts, and configures all technical infrastructure. High-voltage certified grid tie-ins are coordinated via our network of licensed local electricians.
